status: M1 + M2 + M3 일부 완결. work_26_05_11-b (#56) 가 M1 envelope/types/CommandStatus hygiene 청산. work_26_05_11-c sprint 진입: M1 마지막 부채 PR-D (audit actor enrichment + request_id + audit_logs 마이그레이션).
head_summary: Merge pull request #56 from ykylee/claude/work_26_05_11-b (M1 cleanup envelope + types + CommandStatus)

M0.notes: Authentication and authorization gate normalized. SEC-1..SEC-4 resolved.

M1.notes: RBAC track merged via PR #20-23, #29-31, #27, #28 (2026-05-08). PR-B (T-M1-02·07·08 envelope + types + WS) + PR-C (T-M1-03·05 lifecycle + auth_test) merged 2026-05-11 via #56 (work_26_05_11-b). PR-D (T-M1-04 audit actor + migration) underway in work_26_05_11-c.

M2.notes: login_action sprint (2026-05-08): PR-LOGIN-1/2 (backend login + frontend form). work_26_05_11 sprint (2026-05-11): logout(#45/#51) + account password(#50) + deploy guide(#49). Track S (#52-#55) ships system_admin gating + /admin/settings + accounts admin endpoints + org chart drag/leader.

frontend.phase: Phase 6 done; auth flow complete (login + logout + callback + account); /admin/settings shell live with users/organization/permissions sub-routes; sidebar gates system menu on actor.role.
frontend.auth: OIDC code flow with PKCE end-to-end. tokenStore persists access/refresh/id; apiClient auto Authorization. AuthGuard 401 -> /login + system route gate. Header Sign Out drives Hydra /oauth2/sessions/logout via id_token_hint, Kratos cookie killed via fetch.
frontend.rbac: PermissionEditor at /admin/settings/permissions wired to /api/v1/rbac/policies. defaultLandingFor + isSystemAdmin + pathRequiresSystemAdmin in lib/auth/role-routing.ts.

backend.phase: M2 done. Auth proxy: /api/v1/auth/{login,logout,token,signup,consent} + accounts admin (/api/v1/accounts {POST/PUT password/PATCH/DELETE}).
backend.auth: BearerTokenVerifier (Hydra introspection) + enforceRoutePermission. Logout: Hydra accept + revoke (Kratos owned by frontend, DEC-1=B). Accounts admin proxies Kratos admin (FindByUserID + UpdateIdentityPassword + SetIdentityState + DeleteIdentity).
backend.test_check: PASS — go test ./... (httpapi includes 10 accounts admin tests + 11 logout tests + auth_login + auth_token + RBAC).
backend.rbac: rbac_policies seeded with developer/manager/system_admin. /api/v1/accounts gated as security:create / security:edit / organization:edit / organization:delete.
backend.auth_envs: DEVHUB_HYDRA_ADMIN_URL, DEVHUB_HYDRA_PUBLIC_URL (revoke), DEVHUB_KRATOS_PUBLIC_URL (login), DEVHUB_KRATOS_ADMIN_URL (signup + accounts admin).

infra_idp.scaffold: infra/idp/ (hydra.yaml, kratos.yaml, schemas, scripts) — verified 2026-05-08 sandbox.
infra_idp.deploy_guide: docs/setup/test-server-deployment.md — native binary, no-docker, full e2e flow.

merged_prs_work_26_05_11.title: feat(ui): role-based landing + system_admin sidebar gating (PR-S1)
feat(org): persist drag positions + leader change (PR-S4)

m1_remaining: T-M1-02 PR-B: API envelope/role wire 일관 + 통합 테스트
T-M1-03 PR-C: command lifecycle 6 상태 + dry-run/live 경계
T-M1-04 PR-D: audit actor 보강 (source_ip, request_id, source_type) + migration
m2_followups: Kratos identity 매핑 캐싱 — users.kratos_identity_id 칼럼 추가로 FindIdentityByUserID O(1) 화
Kratos webhook 수신 → DevHub audit_logs 통합 (self-service password 변경 등 audit)
Hydra JWKS / introspection verifier 실구현 (현재는 introspection 기반)
next_actions.ops_verification: 사용자 환경에서 docs/setup/test-server-deployment.md 의 §6-§7 e2e 절차 1회 수행 권장 — 로그인/로그아웃/비밀번호 변경/계정 발급/disable/조직 차트 drag 영속화 전체.
